scope: TG-P14 Phase 1 -- KV_BOTH staging recovers the ctx4096 promotion miss (the smallest change: an existing flag, no new primitive)
lever: DECODE_FLASH_BLOCK_TILE_G5_KONLY=0 (stage V in 8KB LDS instead of reading V from global during PV)

amd_health.note: each heavy W==D run transiently spiked ~16 ttm kworkers to D; all cleared within seconds, confirmed by smoke -- not a wedge

speed_wd.authority: qk_tg_p5_attention_wd.py same-session median decode ms (timing valid; its token_match gate is the known unprefilled-KV artifact and is NOT used for correctness)
speed_wd.vs_k_only_prior: K_ONLY was 99.1%/97.5%; KV_BOTH is ~98.6%/~98.5% -- ctx4096 +0.8-1.0pp (clears 98%), ctx512 -0.5pp (LDS doubled -> slight occupancy cost, still >=98%)

correctness.tile_isolated: block-tile microgate (KV_BOTH default) PASS: rel_rmse 1.3e-07 vs reference (deterministic)
correctness.in_model_prefilled: qk_prefilled_route_parity.py (NEW deterministic authority: real prefill of a 769-token prompt so g5 fires at ctx>=512, then greedy temp=0): generated route == owned route 48/48 token-identical, no divergence
correctness.route_bound: W==D all_bound=True x3 reps; parity run used g5 kernels (flash_block_tiled_xlane_score_pv_tile_whole_cache + flash_fused_gmax_combine)

verdict_by_task_bar: PASS_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE -- route-bound, correct (48/48 prefilled parity), no hidden fallback, >=98% of owned at BOTH ctx512 and ctx4096 across 3 reps

caveats.borderline_margin: the ctx4096 worst-case margin (98.3% = 0.3pp above the 98% floor) is comparable to the run-to-run spread (0.3pp); a further run could dip near 98%. This is a MARGINAL pass, not a robust win.
caveats.boltbeam_stricter_bar: boltbeam reopen-check on decode_attention_g5_8b_refuted with this KV_BOTH evidence still returns REFUTE: it treats -1.7% ctx4096 as a protected-context regression and, as a previously-refuted candidate, requires a WIN over owned to reopen, not a near-tie. Owned HIP is still ~1.7% faster at ctx4096.
caveats.not_a_new_primitive: KV_BOTH is an existing staging option -- the smallest possible change. No new generated-UOp primitive was required to clear the task's 98% bar.

next: Attempt the vectorized-V PV primitive (Phase 0 proposal) to convert the borderline near-tie into robust margin / a win over owned; if it does not help or refutes, this KV_BOTH marginal PASS stands.
